message:
fix(raptorq): use single-block geometry for decode parameter reconstruction

The decoder only receives k_source + symbol_size from metadata, not
the encoder's original block partitioning. Replace the multi-block
calculation with a single-block geometry that the current codec metadata
can faithfully describe, avoiding mismatched ObjectTransmissionInformation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
